name: General Agent Authorization
description: Broad delegation of authority to an AI agent — defines action categories, spending caps, revocation terms, and principal liability. Compliant with Civillikums Art. 2289-2318 (LV), UETA s. 14 (US), and eIDAS Art. 25.

principal_name.description: Full legal name of the delegating entity or individual

principal_type.description: Legal entity type of the principal

principal_registration_number.description: Company registration number, personal code, or EIN

agent_id.description: Agent wallet address (0x...) or platform identifier

scope.description: Natural language description of authorized actions

categories.description: Approved action categories (e.g. procurement, data-queries, api-calls)

spending_limit_per_tx.description: Maximum spend per single transaction in USD

spending_limit_monthly.description: Maximum aggregate monthly spend in USD

requires_approval_above.description: Transaction threshold requiring separate principal approval

revocation_notice_hours.description: Hours of notice required for revocation

sub_delegation_allowed.description: Whether agent may delegate to sub-agents
